name: Healthy Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, combine all dry ingredients.
3. In a blender, mix water, vanilla extract, honey and pineapple. Add to above contents.
4. Drop by spoonfuls onto a non-stick baking sheet at 350 degrees F. for 10-12 minutes.
